name: dig-for-discogs
description: Read-only Discogs pressing comparison and collection-aware discovery workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Compare pressings and explore your Discogs collection.
interface.longDescription: Use evidence-backed, read-only workflows to compare Discogs pressings, understand scoring caveats, and explore an authenticated collection without modifying Discogs data.
defaultPrompt: Find the best-sounding pressing of an album.
Compare these Discogs release IDs for value.
Pick something mellow from my collection.
